items.title: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
items.dek: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.
items.body: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dutch police urge victims of 'international sextortion campaign' to come forward
items.dek: Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries.
items.body: Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
